# প্রোগ্রামিং শিখো (Programming Shikho)

> Bengali online learning platform offering video courses in programming, design, IELTS, digital marketing, and career skills, with secure bKash / Nagad / Rocket / card payments and lifetime access.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, featured courses, and platform highlights.
- [All Courses](/courses): Browse the full course catalog with search and category filters.
- [Free Class](/free-class): Sample a free introductory class.
